title: White Amaryllis Flowering Gift Box | Complete Kit with Bulbs | Perfect Festive Flowers | Potting Compost & Pot | Festive Christmas Packaging
features: AMARYLLIS GIFT BOX – Includes everything you need to grow beautiful white amaryllis: a large Hippeastrum bulb (size 24/26), a white plastic pot (11 x 14 cm), and a 0.75-litre bag of potting compost.
FESTIVE GIFT PACKAGING – Presented in an elegant gold Christmas-themed gift box, it’s a perfect present for family or friends during the holiday season.
EASY TO GROW – Features straightforward planting and care instructions, ensuring that anyone can successfully cultivate these striking flowers.
PERFECT FESTIVE DECOR – Amaryllis flowers are renowned for their large, vibrant blooms, adding a touch of elegance and festive charm to any home during the holidays.
CHOICE OF COLOURS – Also available in Red and Striped varieties, all presented in festive gold packaging.
description: From the manufacturer GreenBrokers Spring Bulbs Enjoy the variety of bulbs that we offer. They will produce a colourful flower bulb mix all Spring. The bulbs are packed in a large environmental brown paper bag with carrier handles. Also making them a wonderful gift idea. Simply plant the bulbs into the ground following the instructions on the back of the front card on the pack and wait until the spring for your flowers to emerge. All bee friendly. The Spring Bulb Collections we do are : Mega Pack collection 4 packs in this range, Tulips, Daffodils, Hyacinths & Alliums. Colour Collection 5 colours red, white, purple, pink & yellow. Spring Special Collections Promo Pack 101, Bee & Butterfly Collection, 5 Month Flowering, & Allium Mix. Hyacinth Colour Collection 5 colours Delft Blue, Fondant Dark Pink, Princess Yellow & Pink Pearl. Our bulbs Premium quality bulbs "Holland Selection Quality Mark" & "PEFC Certified". They will transform your garden with whole months of fabulous colour from spring. All include a picture card on each pack, on the back of the card planting instructions. Fantastic value and all the bulb packs are bee & butterfly friendly. All bulbs packed in a brown paper bag with a carry handle.
